observation:
[volume dry, range expanding, gap down, delivery:moderate, fii:neutral, sector:leading, RELIANCE focus, asset liquidity fade] candle neutral participation weak (weak move) RELIANCE closed higher amid moderate volatility. Participation was selective.

mechanism_components.description: Price structure exhibits moderate volatility and momentum when trading within a range-bound pattern, but with an added nuance: the presence of FIIs can lead to increased selling pressure, potentially shifting the price structure towards compression. Additionally, when Reliance Industries is experiencing short-term momentum weakening, the price structure shifts towards compression.
mechanism_components.expected_behavior: Each day's high > previous low (when RELIANCE is trading within a range-bound pattern) or Each day's high < previous high (otherwise)
